description: From the manufacturer Features: Material: ‎100% Cotton Pet Toy Type: Chew Toy Target Species: Dog Breed Recommendation: Large Breeds Colour: ‎Assorted Colours Design: Ring Number of Items: 1 Size: ‎25 x 25 x 5 cm Nuts For Knots Rope Ring Dog Toy The Nuts for Knots Ring is bound to keep a dog busy for hours. The tightly twisted cotton rope ensures long lasting durability, and is great on dogs gums and teeth. The unique shape and design makes this the perfect chew toy for any pooch, hours of cotton picking fun! The design of the ring also makes it perfect for an interactive tug of war with all furry friends!
